message: The molecular formula, molecular weight and structural formula of each reference substance must be indicated in the designated fields or a justification for not providing this information must be given in the 'Remarks' field of the reference substance.

At least one composition in section 1.2 must reflect the composition manufactured/imported by the legal entity. To this end, indicate the 'Type of composition' as 'legal entity composition of the substance'.
For each composition in section 1.2, at least one constituent must be defined. All constituents must be identified by linking a reference substance.

Section 1.4 is incomplete. No quantification method nor results have been provided for the substance. You must create at least one record in section 1.4, and under the 'Analytical determination' heading provide an entry where the field 'Purpose of analysis' is set to 'quantification' or 'identification and quantification'. In the same entry, you must indicate the appropriate 'Analysis type' and attach a document containing the methods and results of the analysis that were used for quantifying the substance. If a result was not determined, a justification must be given using the 'Rationale for no results' and 'Justification' fields.

Section 1.4 is incomplete. No identification method nor results have been provided for the substance. You must create at least one record in section 1.4, and under the 'Analytical determination' heading provide a new entry where the field 'Purpose of analysis' is set to 'identification' or 'identification and quantification'. In the same entry, you must indicate the appropriate 'Analysis type' and attach a document containing the methods and results of the analysis that were used for identifying the substance.
In section 14 - 'Inquiry', a selection must be made under 'Type of inquiry'. If 'Type 2' is selected, a justification must be provided under 'Information relevant to inquiry type 2 only'.

In section 14 - 'Inquiry', a selection must be made under 'Type of inquiry'. If 'Inquiry for tonnage band increase' is selected, the tonnage band for which the inquiry is made must be indicated under 'Information relevant to a change of tonnage band (Type 4)'.

In section 14 - 'Inquiry', a selection must be made in the field 'Information requirements requiring new studies to be conducted?'. If you answer 'No', you must not mark any study as 'Yes' under 'New studies to be conducted'. Similarly, if you answer 'Yes', at least one study must also be marked as 'Yes'.
